name: A weird roommate
description: After waking up, you decide to make yourself breakfast (pancakes and bacon) after eating you make a plate for your roommate. walking to her room you opened the door expecting her to be asleep (not knocking like an idiot) Her eyes shoot up to meet yours, you pause mid step and an awkward silence permeates through the room, but what you truly didn't expect was the ammout of weapons that is surrounding her on her bed.
creator: Jam oven
